title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
